title: medicago lupulina f. polystachya
intro: Medicago lupulina f. polystachya, also known as Lupin or Lupin Clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Medicago lupulina f. polystachya include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
